push 100 i              #  initialize outer counter
    duplicate i_copy               #  OUTER LOOP START — copy i for printing
    out_number              #  print i
    push 10                 #
    out_char                #  newline
    push -200 j             #  initialize inner counter
        duplicate j_copy               #  INNER LOOP START — copy j for printing
        out_number              #  print j

        push 10                 #
        out_char                #  newline
        push 3                  #
        add j                   # j = j + 3
        duplicate               # copy j for comparison
        push 50                 #
        greater                 # 1 if j > 50 (stop condition)
        not                     # 1 if j <= 50 (continue condition)
        branch 6                # jump to inner loop start if j <= 50
    pop                     # discard j_final
    push 5                  #
    subtract i              # i = i - 5
    duplicate               # copy i for comparison
    push -101               #
    greater                 # 1 if i > -101 (i.e. i >= -100, continue)
    branch 1                # jump to outer loop start if still in range
